line_1: A drowsy cadence, as the high trees waved;
line_2: Smooth were the waters that the lowland laved:

line_1: The Branches whisper as they wav'd:
line_2: And lost in Thought, no more perceiv'd

line_1: And high on Alps his crimson banner waved;
line_2: — So when proud Rome the Afric Warrior braved,

line_1: The bridal torch her Evil Angel wav'd,
line_2: Of deepest crimes deceitful Faction rav'd,

line_1: Where its green top the high wood whispering waved,
line_2: Was peopled wide; but the loud storm hath raved,
